chunks.text: 1 IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Criminal Revision Application No. S- 100 of 2021 (Javed Ahmed Panhwar Vs. Gul Baig & others) 1. For Orders on office objection. 2. For hearing of main case. O R D E R. 20-02-2024. Mr. Rukhsar Ahmed Junejo, advocate for the applicant. Syed Sardar Ali Shah, Additional P.G for the State. _______*******__________ 1. Deferred. 2. The applicant by way of instant Crl. Revision Application has impugned order dated 17-09-2021 whereby Direct Complaint filed by him was dismissed by learned IIIrd Additional Sessions Judge Naushahro Feroze. Heard arguments and perused the record. The Evidence produced in preliminary inquiry was found inconsistent on material points. On the basis of such inconsistency, the Direct Complaint filed by the applicant was dismissed by learned trial Court. No illegality is noticed in the impugned order, which may justify this Court to interfere with the same. In view of above, the instant Crl. Revision Application fails and dismissed accordingly. J U D G E Nasim/P.A
